title: Move trls-worker skill source to docs/ and update Makefile
outcome: Created docs/trls-worker-skill-meta.yaml and updated Makefile skill target to deploy trls-worker alongside trls

notes.msg: Files: create docs/trls-worker-skill-meta.yaml, create docs/trls-worker-SKILL.md (moved from .claude/skills/trls-worker/SKILL.md), modify Makefile. Steps: (1) verify current state with make skill && ls .claude/skills/, (2) create docs/trls-worker-skill-meta.yaml with name/description/compatibility fields, (3) defer SKILL.md creation to Task 2, (4) update Makefile skill target to also deploy trls-worker alongside trls, (5) verify with make -n skill, (6) commit: git add Makefile && git commit -m 'build: deploy trls-worker skill via make skill'
Created docs/trls-worker-skill-meta.yaml and updated Makefile skill target to deploy trls-worker skill. Verified with make -n skill.
